extortion.description: José Guma S.A.Occupation: production of household chemicals and hygiene products (soap, cleaning products) + contract manufacturing for third-party brands.Location: Colonia Caroya, Cordoba Province, Argentina.Legal address / factory / site: Lot 1, Malabrigo (Lot 1, Barrio Malabrigo, Cordoba) — part of the company's infrastructure.Structure: one of the heads/President is Jorge Alfredo Gleria.Membership in sustainable initiatives: for example, they are a member of the RSPO (Organization for Sustainable Palm Oil Production).
